message:
feat(python): numpy.i0 wrapper parity (franken_numpy-43yb)

Adds a passthrough wrapper for numpy.i0(x) — modified Bessel
function of the first kind, order 0. Test covers i0(0)=1.0 exact,
i0(1)≈1.2660658 reference, 1-D small-value array, large-value
asymptotic regime (no overflow), integer input promotion with
dtype parity, 2-D element-wise, and i0(-x)=i0(x) symmetry check.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
